section.heading: Deposit and retention of credit card refunds or rebates

content.p: On and after November 28, 2001, refunds or rebates received on an on-going basis from a credit card services provider under the Department of Agriculture’s charge card programs may be deposited to and retained without fiscal year limitation in the Department’s Working Capital Fund established under section 2235 of this title and used to fund management initiatives of general benefit to the Department of Agriculture bureaus and offices as determined by the Secretary of Agriculture or the Secretary’s designee.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation act:
